title: The Secret of the Gold Medal
overview: The Golden Medal that has the key to unlocking the secrets of the Mayan Civilization was stolen by Lord Zero! Professor Gilt sends Montana and Alfred to the ruins of the ancient Mayan Civilization in order to reclaim it. On the way they meet Melissa, a diplomat's daughter in the city of Merida. They head into a pyramid. What was waiting there?

title: The Giant Squid
overview: While searching for gold that was plundered by the Spanish fleet in the 16th century Oceanographer Professor Cosgrove goes missing in the Caribbean.  Montana, Alfred and Melissa head an investigation to find the missing Professor.

title: Treasure Hunting in Istanbul
overview: During renovation work at the St. Sophia Church,  treasures from the Byzantine Empire are discovered. Under Professor Gilt's orders, Montana, Alfred and Melissa head to the church. However! Lord Zero is already  there! The great chase for the treasure ensues.

title: The Discovery of the Jewel Bible
overview: A manuscript of an old document has been discovered in Prague's cathedral that tells the vision of the 14th-century Holy Roman Emperor Carl II. Alfred heads to Prague to investigate the manuscript.

title: The Silk-carpet of The Tahj Mahal
overview: Montana heads to India under Professor Gilt's orders. Apparently a silk carpet is hidden somewhere inside of The Tahj Mahal.

title: The Horrible Snowman
overview: According to Tibetan legend it it said that a snowman trampled on the Dalai Lama's mandala at the Potala Palace. Montana heads to Tibet to investigate this legend.

title: The Tomb from The Pharaoh
overview: According to a local beggar there is a treasure hanging from King Tut's neck.  Montana and Alfred head to Cairo, Egypt to investigate King Tutankhamen's remains in the Cairo Museum.

title: King Arthur's Sword
overview: Alfred heads to The Museum of London looking for clues on King Arthur's sword.  Apparently the sword is located in Glastonbury, England. Alfred along with Montana and Melissa head over to Glastonbury.

title: The Secret Code of The Incas
overview: Machu Pichu an abandoned city built on top of a mountain 2,430 meters (7,790 feet). It is said that you can only obtain the egg of the Golden Condor at noon on the Summer Solstice. Montana and crew head over to Machu Pichu there immediately to investigate this ancient legend.

title: Criminals in Chinatown
overview: Montana, Alfred and Melissa travel to San Francisco's Chinatown to investigate the illegal trade of ancient antiquities

title: Adventuring with The VIkings
overview: Montana, Alfred and Melissa land on Gotland island after hearing about a treasure that was sought after by Viking King Cherval. They find the King's ancient tomb but not before being intercepted by Lord Zero!

title: The Treasure in The Desert
overview: Montana leads an expedition to find the Legendary Tower of Babel but not before Lord Zero captures Melissa as a hostage. Can Montana save Melissa in time before the bombs set by Lord Zero explode?

title: The Secrets of The Dried Fountain
overview: Montana and crew head this time to Granada, Spain under orders from Professor Gilt. Melissa is attacked by a horde of cows and runs into Alhambra.

title: A Secret Entrance in The Castle
overview: Alfred's gone missing! Montana heads to Swan Castle in Germany (Neuschwanstein Castle) after being contacted by Dr. Gilt. Melissa, who was just looking forward to skiing, joins Montana to look for the missing Alfred.

title: The Subterranean Waterfalls
overview: Montana and Alfred arrive in King Solomon's temple in search of the legendary treasure The "Golden Candlestick" only to find a huge stone. After further research suggesting that the treasure was transferred to Paris, France in the Middle Ages. They arrive at a park in the middle of Paris where the Knights Templar were formerly based in.  Where on earth is this treasure?

title: A Muddy Fight for The Future
The Golden Dragon from Hong Kong
The Clock from Ivan The Terrible
The Rescuing Boomerang
overview:
Montana, Alfred and Melissa head this time to Australia to locate the treasure known as "The Ruby of Tears" which has been hidden in Ayers Rock in the middle of the Australian desert. Lord Zero also attempts to get help from an local Aboriginal boy known as Tosiva. Can Montana finally reverse his fortunes against Lord Zero?

Location:  Australia (Ayers Rock)

title: Attack of The Sharks
overview:
A Roman ship was found sunk off the coast of Monte Carlo. Montana, Alfred and Melissa, under a directive from Professor Gilt, head to Monaco to look for the legendary bronze statue of Sifnos. But Lord Zero is ahead of them, having dug a tunnel under his mansion leading to the bottom of the sea. In the city of Monte Carlo, a battle between Montana and Dr. Nitro's giant mechanical crab begins to unfold.

Location: Monte Carlo, Monaco

title: The Attack of The Bandits in Mongolia
Searching Through the Labyrinth of King Minos
The Secret of The Mont St. Michel
The Baker and the Knight Room
